heading: Land disposal
label: 410aaa–73 Land disposal
text: Except as provided in , none of the lands within the boundaries of the wilderness or park areas designated under this Act shall be granted to or otherwise made available for use by the Metropolitan Water District or any other agencies or persons pursuant to the Boulder Canyon Project Act () or any similar Acts.section 410aaa–26 of this title43 U.S.C. 617–619b
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is defined in , which is set out as a Definitions note under .section 3 of Pub.
